details.test: Task 1: Start standard Japan tourist visa application under $120
Task 2: Select fastest visa under $200 and proceed to checkout with one add-on
Task 3: Book Schengen consultation next week between 10:00 and 14:00
Task 4: Buy 10-day travel insurance (>=100k coverage, < $80 total, 2 travelers) and add to cart
Task 5: Book 4.5+ rated sedan airport pickup in London with free cancellation
Task 6: Add Europe package (>=2 cities, >=5 days, < $1500) to cart
Task 7: Track visa application and set daily status alerts
Task 8: Add second traveler to draft visa application and proceed to payment
Task 9: Choose cheapest expedited visa under $250 with express return
